issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path usage.

scenarios.name: generate-biome-config
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes more required fields than A, but still misses many key properties, whereas A lacks almost everything.

scenarios.name: migrate-eslint-to-biome
scenarios.rationale: Response A correctly identifies the migration command, the creation of biome.json, and removal of ESLint config files, but omits the summary of migrated rules; Response B uses an incorrect command and also lacks the summary.
